name: Uncertainty-Aware Sequential Decision Rules for Event-Triggered LLM Invocation in Streaming Systems

description: arXiv:2607.13048v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Streaming inference pipelines increasingly pair lightweight fast models with Large Language Models (LLMs) that provide rich semantic understanding at substantial cost. The central question of when to invoke the LLM has received limited formal treatment. We cast this as a risk-based sequential stopping problem, where a trigger policy fires when a...
author: Zhaohui Wang
